decision: Store fieldState (pending/accepted/rejected) inside the FormField JSON blob in the fields column rather than adding a new DB column
why: No schema migration needed; field-level review state is intrinsically part of the field data already stored in that JSON blob. PATCH route merges it on save.

decision: Export getClient() from analyze-form.ts as a shared singleton for all AI route handlers
why: analyze-web/route.ts was instantiating its own Anthropic client, creating a second singleton. Exporting getClient() from analyze-form.ts centralizes the singleton and ensures ANTHROPIC_API_KEY validation happens in one place.

decision: Sanitize WebField label/id/placeholder with PROMPT_INJECTION_PATTERN before prompt interpolation
why: These fields are user-controlled strings injected verbatim into the Claude system prompt. Stripping HTML tags, instruction delimiters (###, ---), role-switch keywords (system:, user:), and zero-width Unicode characters closes the prompt injection vector identified in the security audit (issue #23).

decision: Use Claude Vision API for image-to-form-field extraction instead of a separate OCR library
why: Claude's vision API understands form layout, field labels, checkboxes, and field relationships directly from images — superior to OCR-then-parse for forms. Eliminates the need for Tesseract or similar OCR dependencies. The Anthropic SDK we already use supports vision natively via image content blocks.

decision: Use sharp for image preprocessing (resize, EXIF rotate, HEIC conversion) before sending to Claude Vision
why: sharp is fast (libvips-based), handles HEIC via libvips, auto-rotates from EXIF, and resizes efficiently. One dependency covers all preprocessing needs. Images are capped at 2048px longest edge to stay within Claude vision limits and reduce latency.

decision: Comprehensive UI/UX overhaul across all pages
why: Landing page lacked visual depth (emoji icons, no sections beyond hero). Upload page had no drag-and-drop or progress indicators. FormViewer explanations were always expanded (noise). Dashboard had basic empty state and no file type icons. Confidence indicators used only colored badges without visual bars. No loading skeletons or 404 page existed. All changes use Tailwind only, no new dependencies.

decision: Form validation engine with required/format/confidence checks, client+server dual validation, force-export override
why: #41 — prevent form rejection from government agencies due to missing/invalid fields

decision: Data source guidance: whereToFind field added to analysis prompt, cache, and UI
why: #51 — help users locate physical documents/items needed for form fields

decision: Image preprocessing with sharp: auto-rotate, resize 2048px max, HEIC→JPEG, min 400x400
why: #45 — foundation for image upload epic, Claude Vision needs preprocessed base64 input

decision: Keyword-based category detection (no AI call) + Claude Vision for image upload
why: #44 + #47 — domain-specific prompts improve explanation quality, vision enables photo/screenshot upload

decision: Upload UI: always show Take Photo button regardless of user agent
why: UA detection is unreliable and desktop browsers gracefully fall back to a file picker when capture attribute is set — no downside to always showing it

decision: Form templates with fuzzy label matching and sensitive field stripping
why: #40 — enable repeat filers to save time on recurring forms

decision: Upload UI supports images with clipboard paste, camera capture, and thumbnail preview
why: #49 — complete frontend for image upload epic

decision: preferredLanguage stored as a top-level column on Profile (not inside encrypted data blob), cache keys include language suffix for non-English
why: #46 — language preference is not sensitive and needs to be queryable server-side without decryption; cache keys include :lang suffix (e.g. first_name:text:es) to prevent cross-language cache pollution while keeping English keys backward-compatible

decision: Retry wrapper uses duck-typed status check instead of APIError import for zero-dependency testability
why: #66 — withRetry uses (err as { status?: unknown }).status rather than importing from @anthropic-ai/sdk so the retry module has no SDK dependency, making it trivially testable with plain Error objects that have a status property attached.

summary: #150 PH launch prep: IP rate limiting on upload (20/hr), /api/stats live counter with 60s cache, landing page forms-processed badge + PRODUCT_HUNT_URL const for PH badge. Manual needed: PH listing, demo video, Railway pool params.

#151 transactional emails via Resend: WelcomeEmail (createUser event), FormCompletedEmail (PATCH COMPLETED), ProUpgradeEmail (stripe webhook checkout.session.completed). All best-effort, no-op without RESEND_API_KEY.
#152 upload upsell modal: pre-flight billing check on mount, intercept submit at free limit, show modal with usage meter + Pro features + Stripe CTA. Race condition 402 also triggers modal.
#153 onboarding checklist: 3-step (profile/upload/autofill), localStorage dismiss, auto-dismiss on completion. Replaced ProfileBanner.

#154 form completion share card: FormCompleteOverlay modal with editable tweet, X/Twitter share, copy-with-UTM, PDF download. FormViewer Mark as Complete button. localStorage fp_completed_${formId} prevents re-show.
#155 mobile layout: DocumentImageViewer mobileCollapsed prop, FormViewer text-base/min-h-[48px] touch targets, responsive form detail page.
#157 template management page: /dashboard/templates server page + TemplateCardList client (copy link, delete), Templates nav item added to DashboardNav
#162 use template: POST /api/templates/[id]/use creates Form with ANALYZED status + increments usedCount, Use template button in TemplateCardList and public /t/[slug] page
#164 profile completeness: live bar in ProfileForm (10 fields, blue/amber/emerald), amber nudge on dashboard < 60%
#161 landing social proof: testimonials behind SHOW_TESTIMONIALS env flag, footer with Privacy/Terms/Demo/Dashboard links + PH badge slot

#163 re-engagement email: FormAbandonedEmail template, POST /api/cron/nudge-abandoned (CRON_SECRET auth, 48h idle, 7d cooldown, lastNudgedAt), GET /api/forms/[id]/dismiss (HMAC token, marks COMPLETED), vercel.json cron 0 10 * * *. Needs CRON_SECRET env + db:push
Error states in FormViewer: autofill banner, save retry button, suggestion unavailable sentinel. Used IIFE in JSX for typed local var to enable 3-way branch on error/found/null suggestion.
Pricing section on landing page. Free/Pro cards. PRO_PRICE from env var. Placed between How It Works and Testimonials for conversion flow.
Upload UX: 5-step timed loading steps (1.2/3.5/7/12s) + 5-dot segment bar. Privacy trust signals (AES-256-GCM verified from crypto.ts) below form.
Cursor pagination on dashboard form list. GET /api/forms?cursor=&limit=. fetch N+1 pattern. Load more button hidden when filter active.

Structured Claude API error messages: api-error.ts maps 429→rate_limited+retryAfter, 503/529→ai_unavailable, others→analysis_failed with sanitised message. Frontend parses error codes for human-readable text + Try again button. retryAfter read from retry-after header, defaults 60s.

decision: #179 dashboard stats widget — fields counted in JS from JSON blob (no DB aggregate possible), SECONDS_SAVED_PER_FIELD=45, widget hidden until first form exists, quota card only for free tier
summary: Added DashboardStats component with server-side computed stats

QuotaBar component: progress bar + label showing monthly usage for free users. slate/amber/red color states at 0-2/3-4/5+ forms. Pro users see Unlimited badge. Rendered as inline banner after profile nudge, only when forms exist.

Re-fill from prior submission: new POST /api/forms/[id]/re-fill maps old field values to new form via Groq LLM; upload page prior-form picker modal; FormViewer violet prior-fill badge + yellow verify-this for date fields
why: P0 feature — users filling recurring annual forms (W-4, I-9, visa) waste time re-entering 80% identical data

summary: Learn from corrections: inline Save as preference toast on autofill field edit, upserts into FormMemory(fieldType=correction,confidence=1.0), auto-used by suggestion engine, deletable from Profile page
why: P1 trust feature — AI never learning from corrections eroded user trust

summary: Field-level help drawer: (?) icon per field opens right-side drawer/bottom-sheet showing explanation+example+commonMistakes from stored field data; rate-limited endpoint 30/hr Pro 15/hr Free
why: P1 conversion feature — confusion over field labels was leading to app abandonment

decision: UpgradeNudgeBanner uses localStorage 7-day suppress rather than DB flag
why: Avoid extra DB column for transient UI state; localStorage is sufficient for cross-session dismiss

decision: ConfidenceReviewPanel calls handleExport() not doExport() directly
why: Preserves the normal export path (validation + preview modal). Confidence review is a pre-step, not a bypass.

summary: Fixed missing onClick on IMAGE mobile FieldOverlay (#210) — PDF branch was correct, only IMAGE mobile collapsed branch was affected
feat(#271): shareable profile import via URL and QR code — signed JWT export, blank-only deep merge import, public import page, QR modal in ProfileForm
feat(#283): PH launch kit — testimonials on by default, PRODUCT_HUNT_URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_PH_URL env var
feat(#282): annual pricing plan — $79/yr tier, plan picker UI, from $6.58/mo copy across CTAs
feat(#284): contextual field Q&A — ask follow-up questions in the help drawer, Claude answers with field context
feat(#286): proactive re-fill banner — detects same-category prior form within 90 days, offers one-click answer reuse

decision: Built AI value validation (#399): deterministic fix suggestions for SSN/EIN/phone/ZIP/date + Claude fallback endpoint + Apply fix button in FormViewer + format errors in ExportPreviewModal
Built insights page (#401): time saved calc, accuracy trend sparkline, category breakdown, streak, top field. Server-rendered, no chart lib needed.
Public community form library (#400): ISR /library page with search + category filter, admin approval API, PUBLIC_PENDING visibility state
Webhook integration (#403): HMAC-SHA256 signed payloads on form completion, Pro-gated, fire-and-forget delivery, settings page with test button
Shareable form packet (#405): link-based recipient access, locked/open field split, merge-back on submit, Pro-gated

summary: AI form overview card (#414), onboarding modal (#413), shareable form packet (#405), webhooks (#403), public library (#400), insights (#401), co-pilot (#404), validation (#399)
